final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial product shot for a summer women's fashion e-commerce hero image featuring a white dress.

Style/medium: Japanese film photography aesthetic, bright and airy editorial fashion, Kodak Portra-inspired color science
Composition: mid-shot framing the dress at 3/4 angle, 50mm lens, dress hem captured mid-sway to show movement
Subject: flowing white summer dress with lightweight fabric catching the sea breeze, natural fabric drape and motion
Scene/backdrop: coastal beach setting with clear blue sky meeting turquoise ocean horizon, minimal sand visible
Lighting/mood: soft natural daylight, diffused sunlight creating gentle highlights on fabric, relaxed vacation atmosphere
Color palette: clean white dress as anchor, bright cyan-blue ocean and sky as dominant backdrop, subtle warm skin tones as accent
Materials/textures: breathable cotton/linen blend fabric with visible weave, soft translucent layers catching wind
Avoid: harsh shadows, oversaturated colors, plastic-looking fabric, cluttered backgrounds, generic stock photo aesthetic
